note: MEASURED baseline (Phase-12, sonnet single-shot, 115 curated paired cases incl. 12 T-12.9 harder cases). T-12.9 added bypassable-mitigation + cross-function + FN/FP-boundary pairs with NO answer-leaking comments. The current sonnet+reference agent still scores J=1.0 on the full set (incl. all 12 hard cases) -> the corpus remains SATURATED for the top agent. HEADROOM is now DEMONSTRABLE though: on the 5 subtle FN/FP cases a reference-ablated shallow reviewer scored J=0.8 vs the reasoning agent's 1.0 (it missed authN-present/authZ-missing IDOR), so the metric responds to agent quality. Residual lever to exercise headroom vs the top agent = multi-file/whole-repo + real-CVE-in-context cases (follow-up T-12.9b) and the opus k-run re-baseline (T-12.5).
